suppression_rules.title: Focus reduces proactive interruptions

suppression_rules.title: Approvals stay visible without becoming noisy

presets.title: Open Household
presets.detail: Normal delivery with no quieting overrides.

presets.title: Work Focus
presets.detail: Keep routine traffic quiet, but leave approvals visible.

presets.title: Meeting Quiet

presets.title: Sleep Guard

summary.label: Focus active
summary.detail: Focus is active on the phone, so JARVIS should keep interruptions quieter.

policy_rules.title: High-confidence security sounds stay visible
policy_rules.detail: Door, glass, alarm, and siren detections should route into the security lane even during quieter command posture.

policy_rules.title: Routine sounds queue for review
policy_rules.detail: Lower-risk sounds should be captured, tagged, and reviewed without creating unnecessary interruption noise.

policy_rules.title: Resolved sounds drop out of the active queue
policy_rules.detail: Once acknowledged, sound alerts stay visible in history but stop contributing to the active attention stack.

response_plans.title: Security Follow-up
response_plans.detail: Route this sound through security review and camera context for hallway.

response_plans.title: Household Follow-up
response_plans.detail: Use the household lane for comfort, child, or pet-related sounds when they appear.

response_plans.title: Brief Queue Review
response_plans.detail: Any unresolved sound should stay in the next command review until it is either resolved or escalated.

policy_rules.title: Entryway captures stay reviewable
policy_rules.detail: Porch, door, garage, and driveway captures should stay visible until someone reviews or resolves them.

policy_rules.title: Package context routes into household follow-up
policy_rules.detail: Package-like captures should route into the household lane so delivery context is easy to review.

policy_rules.title: Readable document captures queue for review
policy_rules.detail: OCR-like captures with labels, receipts, or bills should stay queued for a later command review.

response_plans.title: Security Follow-up
response_plans.detail: Keep front_cam visible in the security lane until the entryway capture is reviewed.

response_plans.title: Household Follow-up
response_plans.detail: Treat this as a household delivery capture and keep it visible in the next brief until someone acknowledges it.

response_plans.title: Review Queue
response_plans.detail: Any unresolved vision capture should stay available in the next command review until it is resolved or promoted.

summary.label: Focus session active
summary.detail: JARVIS is treating current playback as part of the active focus environment.

routing_rules.title: Focus media stays non-disruptive
routing_rules.detail: When focus is active, ambient or instrumental playback should stay steady while spoken interruptions route elsewhere.

routing_rules.title: Quiet-hours playback should stay gentle
routing_rules.detail: Quiet-hours playback should favor calm, low-interruption media and keep louder follow-ups for the next Brief.

routing_rules.title: Household alerts can override media
routing_rules.detail: If the home enters an alert posture, media should duck behind the household alert lane until the alert clears.

response_plans.title: Preserve Focus Session
response_plans.detail: Keep the current ambient session running as the backdrop for focus work.

response_plans.title: Brief Handoff
response_plans.detail: Queue media changes and spoken updates for the next Brief so they do not fragment the current household posture.

response_plans.title: Household Scene
response_plans.detail: Route this playback into the broader household scene so active rooms and routines stay coordinated.

suggested_controls.title: Keep Session Running
suggested_controls.detail: Maintain the current playback as the active focus bed.

suggested_controls.title: Shift to Quiet Mix

suggested_controls.title: Open Media Brief
